title: armeria maritima var. purpurea
intro: Armeria maritima var. purpurea, also known as Sea Thrift, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and minor burns. The plant is also known for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Armeria maritima var. purpurea include tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
